notes: Every product analytics/telemetry event in inventories/*.analytics-event.json. Vars: trigger (when it fires), properties (payload summary).

steps.title: Specify {name} event contract
steps.description: Define {name}: exact trigger ({trigger}), payload schema ({properties}), PII posture (what is never included), and the question this event answers. Register in the event catalog.
acceptance_criteria: catalog entry with schema and PII notes
no free-text user content in payload

steps.title: Instrument {name}
steps.description: Fire {name} at {path} exactly per its contract; respects user consent settings; never blocks or breaks the interaction it measures.
acceptance_criteria: fires once per trigger in dev verification

steps.title: Assert {name} firing in tests
steps.description: Test that {name} fires with the specified payload on trigger and not otherwise (no double-fire on re-render/retry).
